title: Godly Weapons
description: Adds 5 Godly Weapons With Custom Abilities
body:
> **What This Mod Adds:**
> - Herobrine's Sword
> - Null's Sword
> - Alex's Twin blade
> - Steve's Sword
> - Netherblade
> 
> **Mod Guide:**
> - To start all the new items are pretty expensive, 
>   so theyre more late game.
> 
> **Ability Guide:**
> - Herobrine's Sword:
>    - Lightning: Spawns Lightning at Nearby Mobs
> - Null's Sword:
>    - Smoke: Teleports you where you are looking at (max 8 blocks)
> - Steve's Sword:
>    - Last Stand: Get Strength III If below 3 Hearts
> - Alex's Twin blade:
>    - Dual Wield: Get Strength II If you have A Twin blade in your off hand and main hand
> - Netherblade:
>    - Nether Flame: Ignite any mob you hit on fire
>    - Fireball: shoot a fireball
> 
> **Credits:**
> - If you use this mod in your video please put this mod page into your videos description
